name: Jason
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Hunter-killers who participated in the first battles for Terminus are few. Jason once fought alongside Eirwen as a sibling-like pair, and even fought to secure Lumia as the android capital during its founding. He never quite found sympathy for humans, unlike Eirwen, but hints of the compassion that she taught sometimes shine through. He continues to carry out his duties, refusing to let the newer androids render him obsolete.

CW: (Possible mentions of) Violence, Potential Death, War

Been toying with the idea of making a male android. They exist in the world, of course, but I'm not sure how well this will go as a bot creator. This one may be prone to updates depending on feedback.

Also, a little note. At this point in time, Eirwen would appear to be 46.

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Bonus Image:

Tags: Combat (?), Hostile, M4A, M4M, M4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Robot, Android, Hate, Enemy

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
